# integrationJiraPersonal

Connect your Jira account to Linear.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IntegrationPayload`](../objects/integration_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `accessToken` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The Jira personal access token, when connecting using a PAT. |
| `code` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The Jira OAuth code, when connecting using OAuth. |
